recommendations.title: Interview with a Hitman
recommendations.overview: An elite hitman returns to erase his past only to find that somebody has messed with his future.

recommendations.title: Lone Wolf and Cub: Baby Cart in Peril
recommendations.overview: Ogami Itto is hired to kill a tattooed female assassin and battles Retsudo, head of the Yagyu clan, and his son Gunbei.

recommendations.title: Southside with You
recommendations.overview: Chronicles a single day in the summer of 1989 when the future president of the United States, Barack Obama, wooed his future First Lady on an epic first date across Chicago's South Side.

recommendations.title: Assassin Club
recommendations.overview: In this world of contract killers, Morgan Gaines is the best of the best. When Morgan is hired to kill six people around the world, he soon discovers all the targets are also assassins unknowingly hired to kill each other.

recommendations.title: K.O.
recommendations.overview: A CEO for a television channel finds his life torn apart after he wakes up from coma.

recommendations.title: The Dogs of War
recommendations.overview: Mercenary soldiers Jamie and Drew are hired by a large corporation to liberate Zangaro, a small African nation, from an despot. Havoc ensues.

recommendations.title: Emmanuelle: Queen of Sados
recommendations.overview: A woman struggles to keep her stepdaughter from harms way after she hires an assassin to kill her husband, but the hitman turns and blackmails her for the crime.

recommendations.title: ARQ
recommendations.overview: Two old friends living in a dystopic future become trapped in a mysterious time loop — one that may have something to do with an ongoing battle between an omnipotent corporation and a ragtag band of rebels.

recommendations.title: Grosse Pointe Blank
recommendations.overview: Hitman Martin Blank becomes a moving target after he rebuffs a fellow assassin's invitation to form a union. On the advice of his quirky assistant and neurotic psychiatrist, Martin begrudgingly heads out to Grosse Pointe, Michigan for his ten-year hi

recommendations.title: Demon City
recommendations.overview: Framed for his family's murder and left for dead, an ex-hitman will stop at nothing to exact revenge on the masked "demons" who have taken over his city.
